headline: Palantir Drops 4%: Can Its AI Partnerships Justify One of the Market’s Most Expensive Valuations?
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares are sliding in Monday’s session, down 4% to trade $137 and change after opening at $143.06. The move extends a rough stretch for the stock, which is now down 22% year to date. Today’s pullback reflects a familiar tension for Palantir’s investors. On one hand, the company keeps delivering impressive year-over-year ... Palantir Drops 4%: Can Its AI Partnerships Justify One of the Market’s Most Expensive Valuations?

headline: Stressed by the price of car insurance? These tips can help lower costs
summary: If car insurance is straining your budget, try shopping around before taking more drastic steps.
